subject: Escalation: parrot blockers for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-9681
body: Please note the parrot stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace. Reference initiative INIT-9681. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, review.
